name: OpenAI DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI DALL-E 3 via api.openai.com. Good quality but does not follow precise hex values. Use color descriptions instead of codes. Different size constraints.

prompt_rendering.notes: Convert hex values to semantic color descriptions (#D4AF37 → 'warm gold'). DALL-E 3 does not follow exact hex values. Use short style prefix instead of long Style Lock.
